qa_pairs.question: Where can users find an example program that demonstrates the use of the HDF5 library?
qa_pairs.answer: An example program demonstrating the use of the HDF5 library can be found at this link: https://support.hdfgroup.org/ftp/HDF5/examples/examples-by-api/hdf5-examples/1_10/C/H5D/h5ex_d_rdwr.c.

qa_pairs.question: What functionality does the provided HDF5 library example program demonstrate?
qa_pairs.answer: The example program reads and writes data to a dataset. Specifically, it first writes integers to a dataset with dimensions of DIM0xDIM1, then closes the file. It then reopens the file, reads back the data, and outputs it to the screen.
